text:
Question about Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth: How to Invest in Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth? Answer: You can easily invest in Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth in a hassle-free manner on Groww. The
        process is extremely simple, quick and completely paperless. Invest in a few minutes with the following steps:
        
 Log on to your Groww account
 Search for Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth from the search box 
  In order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless
        and take a few minutes to complete
  Once you are done with that, you can start investing in Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your
        investment objective and risk tolerance

metadata.name: Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth

text: Question about Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth: What kind of returns does Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth provide? Answer: The Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth has been there from 01 Jan 2013 and the average annual returns provided by this fund is 13.18% since its inception.

metadata.name: Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth

text:
Question about Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth: How much expense ratio is charged by Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth? Answer: The term
           Expense Ratio used for Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth or any other mutual fund is the annual
        charges one needs to pay to the Mutual Fund company for managing your investments in that fund. 
        The Expense Ratio of Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth is 0.98% as of 06 Mar 2026...

metadata.name: Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth

text:
Question about Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth: What is the AUM of Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth? Answer: The AUM, short for
           Assets Under Management 
        of Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth is ₹2,760.21Cr as of 06 Mar 2026.

metadata.name: Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth

text:
Question about Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth: How to Redeem Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth? Answer: If you want to sell your Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or
        web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your
        desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox.

metadata.name: Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth

text:
Question about Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth: Can I invest in SIP and Lump Sum of Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth? Answer: You can select either
           SIP  or
           Lumpsum  investment of Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth based on
        your investment objective and risk tolerance.

metadata.name: Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth

text: Question about Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth: What is the NAV of Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth? Answer: The NAV of Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth is ₹580.83 as of 05 Mar 2026.

metadata.name: Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth

text:
Question about Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth: What is the PE and PB ratio of Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth? Answer: The
           PE ratio ratio of Tata Large Cap Direct Plan Growth is determined by dividing the market price by
        its earnings per share and the
           PB ratio of the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value
        per share (BVPS).
